name: POLE guard
how_it_solves: POLE hotspot forces MSI_H=False (invariant #5) — was previously letting WRN axis fire on POLE-only cases.
why_it_exists: Prior sprints shipped the SL engine without these hardening rules; Sprint 4S closed the identified holes.

source_receipts.span_extracted: Ch 3.5 — Sprint 4S closed gaps at commit 474b812
